Captain Sarah Johnson.profile_text: Captain Sarah Johnson is a protagonist. Personality traits: resourceful, determined, responsible. Voice and speech style: Commanding yet compassionate.

Dr. Leo Chen.profile_text: Dr. Leo Chen is a antagonist. Personality traits: calculative, ambitious, selfish. Voice and speech style: Ironic and sarcastic.

Captain Johnathan.profile_text: Captain Johnathan is a protagonist. Personality traits: determined, resourceful. Voice and speech style: Commanding yet compassionate.
